competencies.name: Emotional Intelligence

competencies.name: Mentoring Others

competencies.impact_on_others: Sam gains capability; I gain scalability

competencies.name: Team Communication
competencies.team_situation: November strategy meeting, proposed tiered partnership structure (bronze/silver/gold), Leo challenged: agency needs vs neat categorisation
competencies.outcome: Turning collaboration into conflict, proposal stalled

competencies.impact_on_others: Leo and David feel heard, not overruled

competencies.name: Service Design & Delivery
competencies.team_situation: September planning session, self-service portal requiring agencies to configure automation stacks, David's exact question about busy agency owners
competencies.emotional_reaction: felt embarrassed but grateful he caught it early
competencies.outcome: Avoided building wrong solution, pivoted to co-design

competencies.resources_added: Service Design Handbook, TE service design mentorship
competencies.behaviours_added: Habit: weekly co-creation sessions with 2 agencies, user journey mapping after each
competencies.impact_on_others: Agencies feel valued, not sold to

competencies.name: Financial Management

competencies.emotional_reaction: felt exposed because hadn't thought about it
competencies.outcome: Realised gaps (no cost structure, unit economics, pricing strategy)
competencies.specificity_preserved: Timeline (October), meeting context (budget review), service type (white-label automation), specific question (£5K implementation margin)
competencies.resources_added: SaaS pricing courses, TE finance mentorship
competencies.behaviours_added: Habit: Friday 4 PM dashboard review tracking CAC, LTV, and margins weekly
competencies.impact_on_others: Transparent financials enable Sam and Leo to make informed decisions
